form.formComment: Drawn the inside. Most recently finished 4th over 425m at Bendigo beaten 1.3 lengths (24.50) behind Spicy Assassin in a Grade 5 on April 2. This appears within his reach.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Hit the frame at Ballarat last time when a one length third but did record a quick 22.21 over the 390m journey. Expected to go close with a repeat of latest.

formComments.comment: Hit the frame at Ballarat last time when a one length third but did record a quick 22.21 over the 390m journey. Expected to go close with a repeat of latest.

form.formComment: Backs up after finishing 6th on April 1 over 600m at The Meadows in a Grade 4/5. Others preferred.

formComments.comment: Backs up after finishing 6th on April 1 over 600m at The Meadows in a Grade 4/5. Others preferred.

form.formComment: Good effort last time when second (26.11) over 460m at Warragul. Tricky draw to overcome. Looks tested in this line-up.

formComments.comment: Good effort last time when second (26.11) over 460m at Warragul. Tricky draw to overcome. Looks tested in this line-up.

form.formComment: At the last start finished 4th over 350m at Healesville beaten 3 lengths (19.71) behind Evil Eye in a Free For All on March 27. Has ability and can run well.

form.formComment: Won again in an impressive display after running them ragged to make it two on the trot at Bendigo over 425m (23.88). Key chance and should go close again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Won again in an impressive display after running them ragged to make it two on the trot at Bendigo over 425m (23.88). Key chance and should go close again.

form.formComment: Charged out of the boxes with a strong early sectional but bumped into one better when runner up (24.08) at Bendigo over 425m. Boxed on well at the latest run to hit the frame. Leading player.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Charged out of the boxes with a strong early sectional but bumped into one better when runner up (24.08) at Bendigo over 425m. Boxed on well at the latest run to hit the frame. Leading player.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked on turn off back straight and fell.

form.formComment: Missed the frame last start when eighth and beaten 13 lengths at this track. Form solid prior to that including a win at Bendigo three back. Looks a strong place chance on best figures.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Missed the frame last start when eighth and beaten 13 lengths at this track. Form solid prior to that including a win at Bendigo three back. Looks a strong place chance on best figures.

form.formComment: Last start finished seventh in a Restricted WIN H on March 27 over 425m at Bendigo behind Deep Thinker, beaten 9 lengths (24.48). Others make more appeal.

form.formComment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage sixth last time out over 457m at Temora. Prepared to just watch this time.
